title: pinus merkusii subsp. latteri
intro: Pinus merkusii subsp. latteri, also known as the Philippine pine or Balite, is a subspecies of tree in the Pinaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are used to treat various health conditions. The extracts and essential oils from Pinus merkusii subsp. latteri have been traditionally used to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations include tea, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
